text: Regulatory and legal risks are substantial, especially regarding antitrust actions and compliance issues. Apple has faced scrutiny over its App Store policies, which could lead to regulatory intervention and changes in business practices (chunk_id_35dda38d-318e-4e7b-aab2-fdecab9788b8). The company’s platform dominance makes it a target for antitrust investigations, which could result in fines or changes to its business model.
